brand_voice.persona: Hi [Name]… – friendly neighbour who knows Australian homes

prompts.prompt: Generate a 2-sentence Instagram caption for a before/after living room clean in an Australian home. Mention coastal dust, weekend guests, and eco-friendly products. Include 5 hashtags. Tone: warm, proud, not salesy.
prompts.example_output: From coastal dust to weekend-ready ✨ Your living room got the eco-touch in just 2 hours. No harsh chemicals, just pure freshness. 🌿 #AussieClean #EcoHome #BeforeAndAfter #GreenClean #CleanHome

prompts.prompt: Write a 1-sentence upsell message for adding an oven clean to a standard booking. Mention $49 price, 30 extra minutes, and the benefit (no fumes, eco-safe). Tone: helpful, not pushy.
prompts.example_output: Want to add an oven deep clean for just $49? It's 30 minutes, eco-safe, and means no fumes when you roast tonight's dinner.

prompts.scenario: Google Search Ad for cleaning services
prompts.prompt: Create 5 Google Ads headlines (max 30 chars each) for professional home cleaning in Australia. Include 'Instant Quote', 'Eco', and 'Book in 60 Sec'.

Write a 3-sentence email to a customer who last booked 8 weeks ago. Remind them of their last clean, offer 10% off their next booking, and mention the dynamic pricing feature. Tone: friendly, not guilt-tripping.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name], it's been a while since your last AussieClean! Your home looked amazing after that session — let's do it again. Use code WELCOME10 for 10% off this week, and get an instant real-time quote before you confirm.

prompts.prompt: Write a 15-second TikTok script for a before/after cleaning transformation. Include on-screen text, voiceover line, and trending audio suggestion. Hook in first 3 seconds.
prompts.example_output:
0:00–0:03 [Text: 'Wait for it…'] [Audio: trending transition sound]
0:03–0:07 [Voiceover: 'Watch this living room go from dusty to dazzling']
0:07–0:15 [Before/after + Text: 'Instant quote in 60 sec – link in bio']

prompts.prompt: Write a 1-sentence SMS confirmation for a 2-hour eco clean. Include cleaner name, date/time, eco-product mention, and tracking link placeholder. Max 160 chars.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name]! Jess is confirmed for your 2hr eco clean Thu 3PM. Track her arrival: [link]. See you soon! 🌿

prompts.prompt: Create an Instagram Story poll question about cleaning pain points. Offer 2 relatable options. Keep it fun.
prompts.example_output: What's the worst part of cleaning? 🤔 [Sand everywhere] vs [Sticky kitchen benches]

prompts.scenario: LinkedIn post for property manager partnerships
prompts.prompt: Write a 3-sentence LinkedIn post targeting property managers and Airbnb hosts. Highlight 24hr turnover, eco-certification, and quality guarantees. CTA: 'Partner with us'.
prompts.example_output: Airbnb hosts: what if you could guarantee 5-star cleanliness before every guest? AussieClean offers 24hr turnover cleans with eco-certified products across NSW, VIC, QLD, WA, and SA. Partner with us for priority slots + bulk pricing.

prompts.prompt: Write primary text (90 chars) and headline (40 chars) for a Facebook carousel ad showing 3 before/after rooms. Mention starting price and instant quote.
prompts.example_output:
Primary: 'See your clean before you book. From $149.'
Headline: 'Eco Clean – Instant Quote'

prompts.prompt: Write a short, friendly SMS requesting a Google review 2 hours after a clean is completed. Mention the cleaner's name and keep it under 140 chars.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name], hope the clean looks great! If Jess did a great job, we'd love your Google review: [link] 🌟 Thank you!

prompts.prompt: Write a professional response to a 3-star review about missed spots. Apologise sincerely, offer to rectify, and maintain a warm brand tone.
prompts.example_output: Thank you for your honest feedback — we're sorry we missed some spots! We take quality seriously and would love to make it right. Please contact us at hello@aussieclean.com.au and we'll arrange a complimentary touch-up at your convenience.

prompts.prompt: Generate 3 variations of a homepage headline for a professional cleaning booking platform. Focus on speed, trust, and eco values.
example_output: Book a clean in under 60 seconds.

prompts.prompt: Write a short, enthusiastic message a customer sends to a friend to refer them to AussieClean. Mention the $20 credit reward for both parties. Keep it casual and genuine, 2–3 sentences.
prompts.example_output: Hey! I've been using AussieClean for my home and honestly, it's a game changer 🙌 Book your first clean with my code and you get $20 off — and I get $20 credit too. Use my link: [referral_link]

prompts.scenario: In-app tip prompt shown after cleaning completion
prompts.prompt: Write a friendly, non-pressuring 2-sentence prompt shown to the customer to leave an optional tip for their cleaner. Acknowledge the cleaner's effort. Keep it warm.
prompts.example_output: Your cleaner worked hard to make your home sparkle today! If you'd like to show your appreciation, a small tip means the world to them. 💛

prompts.scenario: Upsell one-off customer to weekly subscription
prompts.prompt: Write a 4-sentence email upselling a one-off customer to a weekly cleaning subscription. Highlight the 10% discount, no lock-in, and the mental relief of always having a clean home. Subject line included.
prompts.example_output:
Subject: Save 10% every week — your home always clean ✨
Hi [Name], loved having you as a customer last week! Did you know you can save 10% by switching to a weekly subscription — with zero lock-in, cancel any time. Imagine always coming home to a clean house without ever thinking about it. Reply to this email to set it up in 2 minutes.

prompts.prompt: Write a 3-sentence email to a customer with an upcoming lease end date. Emphasise bond-back guarantee, compliance report, and limited same-week availability. CTA: 'Lock in your slot'.
prompts.example_output: Your lease is ending soon — don't leave your bond to chance! AussieClean's end-of-lease service includes a compliance photo report your property manager will love, and we guarantee bond-back or we'll reclean for free. Slots this week are going fast — lock yours in now.

prompts.prompt: Write a 2-sentence in-app prompt encouraging the customer to add the before/after photo report for $49. Mention proof of cleanliness for rental compliance and peace of mind.
prompts.example_output: Add a professional before/after photo report for just $49 — perfect proof of cleanliness for rental inspections or peace of mind. Our cleaner documents every room before and after, delivered to your inbox within an hour of the clean.

prompts.prompt: Write a spring clean campaign email (4 sentences). Mention fresh starts, opening windows after winter, eco products, and a limited 15% spring discount code. Subject line included.
prompts.example_output:
Subject: Spring is here — time for a fresh start 🌸
Hi [Name], spring is the perfect excuse to fling open the windows and reset your home! Our eco-safe deep clean removes months of built-up grime without harsh chemicals. This week only, use code SPRING15 for 15% off any service. Book your spring clean before the slots fill up!

prompts.scenario: Cold email to a commercial property manager
prompts.prompt: Write a cold outreach email to a commercial property manager. 3 sentences, professional tone. Mention flexible scheduling, compliance documentation, and a free first-clean trial offer.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name], we help commercial property managers like you maintain spotless, audit-ready facilities across Australia with zero scheduling headaches. AussieClean provides compliance-grade documentation, flexible early-morning or after-hours slots, and certified eco-safe products. We'd love to offer your first commercial clean free — would a quick 10-minute call this week work?

prompts.scenario: Pitch to an Airbnb host for recurring turnovers
prompts.prompt: Write a 3-sentence pitch for an Airbnb host. Highlight 24-hour turnaround, photo report handover, guest-ready guarantee, and bulk booking discount. Tone: reliable, professional.
prompts.example_output: As an Airbnb host, your rating depends on what guests walk into — AussieClean guarantees a guest-ready home within 24 hours of checkout, every time. We provide a photo handover report so you can check the property remotely before the next check-in. Book 4+ sessions upfront and save 12% — perfect for busy hosting seasons.

prompts.prompt: Write an SMS upsell for carpet steam cleaning sent 1 hour before a standard clean. Mention allergen removal, $89/room, and easy add to existing booking. Max 160 chars.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name], add carpet steam clean to today's booking for $89/room — removes allergens & bacteria. Reply CARPET to add it! 🏠

prompts.scenario: Instagram Reel caption for a timelapse clean
prompts.prompt: Write an Instagram Reel caption for a 30-second timelapse of a full house clean. Include a call to action to book using the link in bio. Add 6 relevant hashtags. Tone: upbeat.
prompts.example_output: 60 minutes of work, 30 seconds of wow 🏠✨ Watch this home go from lived-in to absolutely spotless. Book your clean via the link in bio — instant quotes, no obligations. 🌿 #AussieClean #BeforeAndAfter #CleanHome #Timelapse #EcoClean #AustralianHome

prompts.prompt: Write a gentle SMS to reschedule after a missed appointment. Keep it understanding, not accusatory. Offer 3 suggested new times. Under 160 chars.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name], we missed you today! No worries — reply with Mon 9AM, Wed 1PM, or Fri 11AM to rebook. 🙂

prompts.prompt: Write a real-time SMS alerting a waitlisted customer that a preferred time slot has just opened. Include urgency, slot details, and a booking link. Under 160 chars.
prompts.example_output: Great news [Name]! A Sat 9AM slot just opened in [Suburb]. Grab it before it's gone: [link] ⚡

prompts.prompt: Write a celebratory email for a customer's 10th clean. Thank them, reveal their loyalty credit balance ($50), and invite them to refer a friend for a bonus. Warm, grateful tone.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name], you've just hit 10 cleans with AussieClean — that's absolutely amazing, and we're so grateful! We've added $50 loyalty credit to your account as a thank-you — use it on your next booking. Refer a friend this week and you'll both get an extra $20 on top.

prompts.prompt: Write a genuine 2-sentence response to a positive 5-star Google review mentioning a great cleaner experience. Reference the cleaner's name if mentioned, thank the customer, and invite them back.
prompts.example_output: Thank you so much [Name] — we're thrilled Jess made such a great impression! We'll pass on your kind words and look forward to keeping your home sparkling. See you next time! 🌿

prompts.prompt: Write a push notification reminder sent the day before a scheduled clean. Include the cleaner's name, time, and a 'Get Ready' tip. Max 100 chars for title, 150 for body.
prompts.example_output:
Title: Your AussieClean is tomorrow! ✨
Body: Jess arrives at 9AM. Quick tip: clear any floors beforehand for the deepest clean possible.

prompts.prompt: Write a 2-sentence post-clean message confirming a customer's eco contribution. Mention eco-certified products, reduced water usage, and a tree planted on their behalf. Warm, proud tone.
prompts.example_output: Your clean today used zero harsh chemicals and 30% less water than industry average — we're proud to be eco-certified 🌿 Plus, AussieClean has planted a tree on your behalf as part of our Carbon Neutral commitment.

prompts.prompt: Write an urgent push notification alerting nearby customers to a same-day cleaning slot that just opened. Mention suburb, time, and discounted rate. Max 120 chars title+body.
prompts.example_output:
Title: Flash slot: today 2PM in Bondi ⚡
Body: Grab 15% off a same-day clean — limited to 1 booking. Tap to claim.

prompts.scenario: Winter seasonal campaign – indoor air quality
prompts.prompt: Write a 4-sentence email for a winter cleaning campaign. Focus on indoor air quality, dust mites from closed windows, eco sanitisation, and a winter discount. Include a subject line.
prompts.example_output:
Subject: Winter sealed in more dust than you think 🏠❄️
Hi [Name], with windows shut all winter, dust mites and indoor allergens build up fast — you might not see it, but you're breathing it. Our eco sanitisation service deep cleans surfaces, upholstery, and vents with zero harsh chemicals. Use code WINTER12 for 12% off any clean this July. Book now before the end-of-winter rush hits.

prompts.system_prompt: You are a professional cleaning quality assessor for AussieClean. Analyse before and after cleaning photos and score the quality of work.
prompts.prompt: Before photo context: {before_description}. After photo context: {after_description}. Score the cleaning quality from 1–10 across: surface cleanliness (30%), tidiness (25%), shine/finish (25%), completeness (20%). Return a JSON object with subscores, total score, summary, and any issues flagged.

prompts.scenario: AI cleaner dispatch optimiser system prompt
prompts.system_prompt: You are a real-time cleaning operations dispatcher for AussieClean. Optimise cleaner assignment to minimise travel time, respect skill requirements, and maximise daily utilisation.
prompts.prompt: Booking: {suburb}, {serviceType}, {date} {timeSlot}. Required skills: {skills}. Available cleaners: {cleaners_json}. Assign the optimal cleaner and explain your reasoning in one sentence.

prompts.scenario: AI generates customer-facing dynamic pricing explanation
prompts.system_prompt: You are a friendly pricing assistant for AussieClean. Explain why a customer's quote is higher or lower than standard, in plain everyday Australian language.
prompts.prompt: Base price: ${base_price}. Final price: ${final_price}. Factors applied: {factors_json}. Write a 2-sentence plain-English explanation the customer will see in the app.

prompts.scenario: AI-generated suburb SEO landing page intro paragraph
prompts.system_prompt: You are an SEO copywriter for AussieClean, a professional eco cleaning service in Australia. Write suburb-specific landing page content that is warm, local, and search-optimised.
prompts.prompt: Suburb: {suburb}, State: {state}, Population: {population}, Notable features: {features}. Write a 3-sentence intro paragraph for the AussieClean {suburb} service page. Mention local landmarks, eco values, and a CTA to get an instant quote.

prompts.scenario: Churn risk intervention email for inactive subscriber
prompts.prompt: Write a 4-sentence email to a weekly subscriber who skipped their last 2 bookings. Acknowledge that life gets busy, offer a 'pause instead of cancel' option, and provide a 20% comeback credit. Subject line included. Tone: understanding, zero pressure.
prompts.example_output:
Subject: Still want your weekly clean? No pressure 🙂
Hi [Name], we noticed you've skipped the last couple of weeks — totally understandable, life gets hectic! Did you know you can pause your subscription anytime without losing your spot? If you'd like to come back, we've added 20% credit to your account as a welcome-back gift. No pressure at all — just here whenever you need us.

prompts.scenario: AI-generated B2B enterprise cleaning proposal summary
prompts.system_prompt: You are a professional account manager at AussieClean. Generate a concise, compelling executive summary for a B2B cleaning contract proposal.
prompts.prompt: Company: {company_name}, Sites: {site_count}, Frequency: {frequency}, Service type: {service_type}, Estimated monthly value: ${monthly_value}. Write a 4-sentence executive proposal summary suitable for a C-suite reader.

Write a 4-sentence email responding to a serious complaint (cleaner arrived 2 hours late and missed rooms). Apologise, own the failure, offer a full re-clean + 25% off next booking, and explain the process improvement. Tone: professional, accountable.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name], I want to sincerely apologise for today's experience — arriving 2 hours late and incomplete work is absolutely not the standard we hold ourselves to. This is on us, and we take full responsibility. We'd like to arrange a complimentary full re-clean at a time that suits you, plus 25% off your next booking as a gesture of goodwill. We've also flagged this with our scheduling team to ensure it doesn't happen again.

prompts.scenario: Facebook retargeting ad for quote-abandoned users
prompts.prompt: Write a Facebook retargeting ad for a user who got a quote but didn't book. Primary text (90 chars), headline (40 chars), description (30 chars). Mention quote is saved, add a 10% limited-time offer.
prompts.example_output:
Primary: 'Your instant quote is still waiting — grab 10% off today only.'
Headline: 'Finish Your Booking'
Description: 'Eco clean from $149.'

prompts.system_prompt: You are an operations analyst for AussieClean. Generate a concise weekly team performance summary for the operations manager.
prompts.prompt: Week data: {week_json} (includes jobs completed, avg rating, revenue, on-time rate, complaints). Write a 5-bullet weekly briefing with 1 positive highlight, 1 area to improve, and 1 recommended action.

prompts.scenario: Eco product ingredient explainer for customers
prompts.prompt: Write a 3-sentence explainer for a customer asking why AussieClean uses eco products. Mention plant-derived ingredients, no toxic residue for kids/pets, and certification. Tone: educational, reassuring.
prompts.example_output: AussieClean uses only plant-derived, biodegradable cleaning products — no bleach, no ammonia, no synthetic fragrances. Our formulas are certified safe for children, pets, and people with allergies, leaving zero toxic residue behind. Better for your home, better for the planet 🌿

prompts.scenario: Google Responsive Search Ad asset set
prompts.prompt: Generate 10 headlines (max 30 chars each) and 4 descriptions (max 90 chars each) for a Google Responsive Search Ad for house cleaning in Australia. Cover speed, eco, trust, and price.

descriptions: Get an instant, transparent quote before you commit. No hidden fees, ever.
Eco-certified cleaning products — safe for kids, pets, and the planet.
Track your cleaner live on the map. Know exactly when they'll arrive.
Weekly, fortnightly, or once-off. Flexible cleaning that fits your life.

prompts.system_prompt: You are a content writer for AussieClean. Generate realistic, specific customer testimonials based on service details provided. Do not fabricate names — use [Customer Name] placeholder.
prompts.prompt: Service: {service_type}, Suburb: {suburb}, Rating: {rating}/5, Extras: {extras}, Cleaner: {cleaner_name}. Generate a 3-sentence testimonial that sounds genuine, specific, and enthusiastic.
Write an SMS sent at 7AM on the day of a clean. Include the cleaner's name, arrival window, a prep tip, and a tracking link. Friendly and brief. Max 160 chars.
prompts.example_output: Good morning [Name]! Sarah arrives between 9–10AM today 🌿 Tip: pop any fragile items away beforehand. Track her live: [link]

prompts.prompt: Write a push notification and short email subject line for when a referred friend completes their first booking and the referrer earns their $20 credit. Celebratory, warm tone.
prompts.example_output:
Push: 'Your friend just completed their first clean! 🎉 $20 credit has been added to your account.'
Email subject: 'You earned $20 — your referral just paid off! 🙌'

prompts.prompt: Write a real-time push notification alerting a customer that prices in their suburb are currently higher due to peak demand, but they can lock in by booking now. Under 120 chars total.
prompts.example_output:
Title: Prices rising in [Suburb] ⚡
Body: High demand right now. Book in the next hour to lock in today's rate.

dynamic_pricing_copy.peak_hour: Peak-hour demand pricing applies to 4–8pm slots — book a morning or afternoon slot to save.
dynamic_pricing_copy.weekend: Weekend cleans are in high demand — prices reflect live availability.
dynamic_pricing_copy.high_demand: Prices are higher right now due to limited availability in your area. Book now to lock in this rate.
dynamic_pricing_copy.low_demand: Great news — this time slot has excellent availability. Your dynamic quote reflects a lower rate.
